title: semrel plugin metadata registry schema
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for the semrel plugin registry. The document root is an object with a required plugins array. Each plugin entry describes discovery metadata and one or more released versions that semrel can download, verify and load.
$comment: GitHub-based registry MVP; later deployable behind registry.semrel.io or a web API/admin panel. Official plugins currently publish from separate SemRels repositories and upload platform binaries plus .sha256 files per release. Cross-check gRPCVersion with ADR-001 Protobuf package versioning (for example: v1).

schemaVersion.description: Registry schema version. Unknown fields are ignored by current semrel clients, but the registry keeps this marker for future migrations.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when plugins.json was last regenerated, or null for bootstrap data.

plugins.description: Registry entries for available semrel plugins. Each item documents a plugin identifier, metadata for discovery, and versioned binary releases for every supported target platform.

httpUrl.description: HTTP or HTTPS URL. Useful for plugin homepages, repositories and downloadable release assets.

spdxLicense.description: SPDX license identifier, for example Apache-2.0 or MIT.

pluginName.description: Stable plugin identifier used by the registry and downloader, for example github or github-actions. Lowercase kebab-case is recommended.

namespace.description: Optional scoped namespace for the plugin, for example @semrel or @google. Allows organisations to publish plugins under their own identifier. Must start with @ followed by lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens.

semver.description: Semantic Versioning 2.0.0 string, for example 0.1.0 or 1.2.3-rc.1.

sha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 checksum for a platform-specific binary asset.

checksums.description: Required SHA-256 checksums for all supported platforms. Store the checksum of the distributable binary or archive that downloadUrl refers to. Generate checksum files with: sha256sum binary > binary.sha256.

compatibility.description: Optional compatibility hints used by semrel to decide whether a plugin release can be installed. minSemrelVersion controls the minimum supported go-semrel version; gRPCVersion tracks the ADR-001 protobuf service generation, for example v1.

gRPCVersion.description: Plugin protocol / protobuf package generation, aligned with ADR-001 versioning such as v1 or v2.

version.description: A concrete published plugin release. downloadUrl points to the release asset for this version. For GitHub-hosted releases, a tag such as provider-github-v0.1.0 is recommended.

releaseDate.description: Release timestamp in ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 date-time format, for example 2026-05-24T12:00:00Z.

changelog.description: Optional per-version changelog or summary of notable changes.

prerelease.description: Marks the release as prerelease so clients can opt in or out of unstable versions.

plugin.description: Plugin metadata entry. Required fields are name, description, author, license, category and versions. Optional fields such as homepage, repository and tags support discovery and future registry UI features.

description.description: Short human-readable description of the plugin.

author.description: Primary maintainer, team or organization responsible for the plugin.

category.description: semrel plugin category used by semrel.yaml and the registry discovery UX.

tags.description: Optional search and discovery labels, for example vcs, github, release or ci.

versions.description: Version history for this plugin. Empty arrays are allowed for registered plugins that do not have published binaries yet.
